scripts.dev: bun build src/index.tsx src/plan-fullscreen.tsx src/diff.tsx src/bash.tsx --outdir dist --watch & bun run dev-server.ts
scripts.build: bun build src/index.tsx src/plan-fullscreen.tsx src/diff.tsx src/bash.tsx --outdir dist --minify && bun run generate-html.ts && bun run build:jscore
scripts.bench: bun run build && bunx playwright test --project=chromium --config=playwright.bench.config.ts --reporter=list
